/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libxela_point_cloud_representation__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libxela_point_cloud_representation__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/xela_point_cloud_representation__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/xela_point_cloud_representation/msg/detail/texel__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/xela_point_cloud_representation__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/xela_point_cloud_representation/msg/detail/hand_sensors__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
